summary: Phase 13 Backend Testing Complete - All provider unified routes migrated from server.py to routes/provider_unified.py are working correctly. 49/49 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Provider Clients routes properly migrated - GET /api/provider/clients, GET /api/provider/clients/{id}, PUT /api/provider/clients/{id} working correctly for both DOULA and MIDWIFE
Client timeline route properly migrated - GET /api/provider/clients/{id}/timeline returns appointments, notes, contracts, invoices, and visits (midwife-only)
Provider Appointments CRUD properly migrated - GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/provider/appointments all working correctly
Provider Notes CRUD properly migrated - GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/provider/notes all working correctly with client filtering
Provider Birth Records properly migrated - GET/POST /api/provider/clients/{id}/birth-record working for both roles
Provider Dashboard properly migrated - GET /api/provider/dashboard returns role-specific stats (visits_this_month, births_this_month, prenatal_clients for MIDWIFE)
Role-based access control verified - Both DOULA and MIDWIFE can access all /api/provider/* routes
Role-based access control verified - MOM correctly blocked from all /api/provider/* routes (403 Forbidden)
is_client_active computed field working correctly in client responses
No MongoDB ObjectId serialization errors - all responses properly exclude _id field
All 404 error handling works correctly for nonexistent resources
All 400 error handling works correctly for missing required fields (client_id)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed clients, appointments, notes, and birth records during testing. Most test data is cleaned up after test execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 13 backend refactoring complete. All provider unified routes have been migrated from monolithic server.py to routes/provider_unified.py (~679 lines). This includes: Provider Clients (list, detail, update, timeline), Provider Appointments (CRUD), Provider Notes (CRUD), Provider Birth Records, and Provider Dashboard with role-specific stats for MIDWIFE. All endpoints verified with 49 passing tests covering CRUD operations, role-based access control, and ObjectId serialization. Both DOULA and MIDWIFE roles can access all provider/* routes while MOM is correctly restricted.

endpoints: GET /api/provider/clients - List all clients with is_active computed field
GET /api/provider/clients/{id} - Get client detail with _counts (appointments, notes, contracts, invoices, visits)
GET /api/provider/clients/{id}/timeline - Get unified timeline with appointments, notes, visits, contracts, invoices
GET /api/provider/clients/{id}/birth-record - Get birth record (returns empty if none)
POST /api/provider/clients/{id}/birth-record - Create or update birth record
GET /api/provider/dashboard - Get dashboard stats (role-specific for MIDWIFE)

objectid_serialization.note: All provider responses properly exclude MongoDB _id field - no serialization errors

details: Client detail includes visits count in _counts for MIDWIFE
Dashboard includes visits_this_month, births_this_month, prenatal_clients for MIDWIFE
Timeline includes visits from both visits and prenatal_visits collections for MIDWIFE

mocked_apis.note: Provider unified routes use real database queries. All CRUD operations tested against live MongoDB.
